title: seseli elatum subsp. austriacum
intro: Seseli elatum subsp. austriacum, commonly known as Austrian masterwort or Austro-masterwort, is a plant species in the carrot family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and carminative effects, which help to relieve digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Seseli elatum subsp. austriacum include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and PMS. Seseli elatum subsp. austriacum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
